---
title: "10) Final Project Prep 1 - NYT Graph Recreation"
---


### 📋 About

TBD


<br>


### 🎯 Objectives

At the end of this unit you will be able to:

- Goal 1.
- Goal 2.
- Goal 3.


<br>


### 🌠 Slides

Find today's slides [here.](slides.html)


### 💻 Code

TBA


<br>


### 📖 Assignment

__Reading__: _Sea Surface Temperature Anomaly on July 31, 2023_

<a href="https://www.nytimes.com/interactive/2023/08/03/climate/ocean-temperatures-heat-earth.html" target="_blank">https://www.nytimes.com/interactive/2023/08/03/climate/ocean-temperatures-heat-earth.html</a>

__Homework__: No HW this week. Work on your final project!
